name: @frontguard/mcp
description: Frontguard MCP server for querying visual regressions, suggested fixes, recent runs, and baseline approvals.

tools.name: list_regressions
tools.description: Return the visual regressions Frontguard detected on a given GitHub PR (or run id). Each row carries a `diffId` you can pass to `get_suggested_fix`.

tools.name: get_suggested_fix
tools.description: Return the AI-generated patch for a single diff (keyed by the `diffId` from `list_regressions`).

tools.name: accept_baseline
tools.description: Promote every screenshot in a run to the new baseline (run-scoped — not per-diff). Requires `run_id` and `confirm_all_regressions_reviewed: true` after you have reviewed every regression from `list_regressions`.

tools.name: recent_runs
tools.description: List the most recent runs the API key has access to. Optional `repo` and `branch` filters narrow the results.
